summary: GOrchestra is an early-stage Go-based orchestration tool with a plugin system, Kubernetes integrations, and a test-driven core architecture.
concerns: project is in early scaffolding phase with uncommitted changes
lack of implementation files (only tests and serve.go visible in key files)
potential over-engineering with plugins and kubernetes examples before core maturity
suggestions: commit or stash the 11 modified and 6 untracked files to stabilize the branch
focus on completing the core detector, runner, and reporter implementations
ensure the HTTP health endpoint added in the latest commit has corresponding tests
